page.title: VAT Filing Assistant
page.subtitle: Import the VAT general taxpayer Excel template, run three layers of validation, and auto-fill the Shanghai eTax website.
page.importHint: Accepts .xls / .xlsx. The file is parsed locally in your browser; nothing is uploaded.
page.previewEmpty: Once a file is imported, taxpayer info and key VAT lines will appear here.
page.reportEmpty: Click Run Validation to see the detailed report.
page.override: I have reviewed the errors above and accept the risk to continue.
page.gateHint: If errors appear, confirm below before running. All acknowledgements and runs are logged locally for audit.
page.noFindings: No blocking issues; you can proceed.

toast.workflowStarted: Workflow started; check Logs for progress
toast.needGate: Import data and clear the gate first
toast.builtinMissing: Built-in workflow missing; refresh the dashboard

tax-vat-load.name: VAT — Load Excel
tax-vat-load.description: Parse the VAT Excel template into the internal data model.

tax-vat-validate.name: VAT — Validate
tax-vat-validate.description: Run structural / business / cross-sheet validation rules.

tax-vat-fill.name: VAT — Auto-fill
tax-vat-fill.description: Fill the parsed VAT model into the Shanghai eTax web form.
